arts.ttl: Roma director Ghisolfi: “Roma are thinking about a second team”
arts.sum: Roma’s Sporting Director Florent Ghisolfi has outlined the club’s strategic plans for growth in a recent interview with Corriere dello Sport (via Calciomercato). The focus is on potentially creating a second team to compete in Serie C and restructuring the youth development system. Regarding the possibility of a second team, Ghisolfi stated, “We are considering the opportunity to create a second team. It’s on our minds. While it’s a cost, clubs that have made this choice are now seeing the results. arts.ttl: Juric emphasises Roma’s potential for growth ahead of Elfsborg clash
arts.sum: Roma manager Ivan Juric addressed the media in Sweden on the eve of his team’s Europa League match against Elfsborg, expressing optimism about the squad’s potential for improvement. Juric acknowledged Roma’s rocky start to the Serie A season but highlighted their recent upturn in form. “We started badly in the league, but with these two victories we have recovered some ground,” he stated. The Croatian tactician emphasized the importance of performing well in European competition, indicating his intention to utilize the full squad depth while maintaining a balanced approach to team selection. arts.ttl: Europa League | Elfsborg v Roma: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: Roma return to UEFA Europa League action as they face Elfsborg in the second matchday of the group stage. The Italian side are seeking their first three points in the competition after a disappointing 1-1 draw against Athletic Bilbao in their opening match at the Stadio Olimpico. However, the Giallorossi have shown signs of improvement in Serie A, securing two victories in their first two outings under new manager Ivan Juric. On the other hand, Elfsborg are still pointless after losing their first match away to AZ Alkmaar. arts.ttl: Pellegrini: “We did not want De Rossi’s sacking”
arts.sum: Roma captain Lorenzo Pellegrini addressed the media ahead of the team’s UEFA Europa League match against Elfsborg, discussing several key topics including the recent coaching change and his relationship with the fans. Regarding the dismissal of former coach Daniele De Rossi, Pellegrini expressed gratitude for De Rossi’s contributions: “First of all, I’d like to thank De Rossi for everything he transmitted to us. It was difficult, he gave us so much on a human level and on the field. arts.ttl: Europa League | Elfsborg v Roma: Match Preview
arts.sum: The picturesque Boras Arena in Sweden will play host to an intriguing Europa League clash on Thursday evening, as IF Elfsborg welcome AS Roma in a battle between two sides seeking their first win of the group stage. While the hosts aim to end a 46-year wait for a home victory in major European competition, the Italian visitors look to improve their disappointing away record on the continent. Elfsborg’s return to the Europa League group stage after a decade-long absence has been hard-earned.
